where.if: AND (gi.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR gi.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT gi.id AS id, gi.category_id AS category_id, gc.name AS category_name, gi.name AS name, gi.code AS code, gi.price AS price, gi.list_price AS list_price, gi.stock AS stock, gi.noti_qty AS noti_qty, gi.sold_out AS sold_out, gi.use_yn AS use_yn, gi.status AS status, gi.sale_count AS sale_count, gi.view_count AS view_count, gi.thumbnail_key AS thumbnail_key, gi.badges AS badges, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GOODS_OPTION o WHERE o.item_id = gi.id) AS option_count, gi.created_at AS created_at FROM GOODS_ITEM gi JOIN GOODS_CATEGORY gc ON gi.category_id = gc.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT gi.id AS id, gi.category_id AS category_id, gc.name AS category_name, gi.name AS name, gi.code AS code, gi.description AS description, gi.price AS price, gi.list_price AS list_price, gi.stock AS stock, gi.noti_qty AS noti_qty, gi.sold_out AS sold_out, gi.use_yn AS use_yn, gi.status AS status, gi.sale_count AS sale_count, gi.view_count AS view_count, gi.thumbnail_key AS thumbnail_key, gi.badges AS badges, gi.created_at AS created_at, gi.updated_at AS updated_at FROM GOODS_ITEM gi JOIN GOODS_CATEGORY gc ON gi.category_id = gc.id WHERE gi.id = #{id}
